name: APAC Compliance Framework Dashboard_v4
description:
A comprehensive dashboard for managing security, risk, and compliance for payment processing across Asia-Pacific markets. It provides an overview of compliance status, regional requirements, technology stack, and incident response protocols. V3-Enhance 3rd PRM scoring and ISO 27001:2022 Annex Control A, ISO 27002:2019, SOC 2 Type II
V-4: Refactored for production-staged back-end
